info.title: Flipdish API - Customers
info.description: Flipdish Open API v1.0 — Customers operations. Flipdish is an online ordering and branded-app platform for restaurants and takeaways. This specification was derived from the official Flipdish Swagger document and grouped by resource domain.

401.description: Authentication has been denied for this request.

IsNewUser.description: Bool indicating if the user accepting the invitation is a new user

InvitedEmailAddress.description: The email address that was invited.

IsSelfServeUser.description: is the account a Self Server

DisplayTimesInUserLocalTimeZone.description: Display the time in time zone local to the user
Display the time in time zone local to the user

FirstLogin.description: Date and time of the user's first login to the app.

FirstLoginHuman.description: Human-readable representation of the first login date.

LastActivity.description: Date and time of the user's last activity in the app.

LastActivityHuman.description: Human-readable representation of the last activity date.

GoogleTokens.description: Number of Google push notification tokens associated with the app install.

AppleTokens.description: Number of Apple push notification tokens associated with the app install.

OrderCount.description: Number of orders placed by the user through this app install.

UserAgentAtSignup.description: User agent string at the time of signup.

UserAgentMostRecent.description: Most recent user agent string used by the user.

MaintainedExternally.description: Channel is Maintained Externally or not

CreateBasicAccountModel.description: Basic attributes for creating an account

CreateUserDeliveryLocationRequest.description: Create a delivery location for a user (admin).

IsDisplayed.description: Passed through to the same parameter position as legacy admin MVC (maps to IsCustomAddress in map service).

FlipdishError.description: Standard Flipdish API error response. Errors are returned as a JSON object with a human-readable message and a programmatic error code (see https://developers.flipdish.com/docs/error-handling).

errorCode.description: Unique identifier for programmatic error handling.

details.description: Additional context returned in non-production environments.

Enabled.description: Is the language enabled for use.

IsEnabled.description: Defines if the feature is enabled

PhoneNumber.description: Defines the phone number to call

DropOffLocationId.description: Represents table service drop off location

DropOffLocation.description: Represents table service drop off location

AcceptedFor.description: Time store has accepted the order for

InFraudZone.description: Was order made within a fraud zone

UnusualHighValueOrder.description: Is order of unusually high value

RejectedByUserId.description: Id of user who rejected order, if available

TaxItems.description: A collection of tax items on the order.

CreatedCampaignVoucherId.description: The id of the campaign voucher that was created from this order

LocalOrderId.description: Local order Id. This is used for displaying a "shorter" order ID for customers (eg. Kiosk orders)

Amount.description:
This is the sum of the OrderItemsAmount, DeliveryAmount, TipAmount and Voucher.Amount (which is usually negative) and OnlineOrderingFee for cash orders.
It does not include the OnlineOrderingFee in the case of card orders as this fee is charged by Flipdish directly to the customer.

ProcessingFee.description: This contains the online ordering processing fee. For card payments this is charged directly to the customer and for cash orders it is paid by the customer to the store. It is tax inclusive.

PaymentAccountDescription.description: Payment account description (like Visa ****2371 or Apple Pay. or Cash)

RejectionReason.description: Rejection reason. Can have value if the order is rejected.

OrderTrackingCode.description: Unique, 6 character long alpha numeric code for tracking.

ReceiptCode.description: Code used to view the order's receipt

TotalDepositReturnFeeAmount.description: This contains the total deposit return fee amount for the order.

IsPublished.description: If the batch is already published

MenuItemPublicId.description: Public id of the Menu Item

MenuItemOptionPublicId.description: Public id of the Menu Item Option

MenuItemOptionSetDisplayOrder.description: Menu item option set display order

UserId.description: The user ID associated with the payment account.

PaymentAccountId.description: Unique identifier for the payment account.

CanRemoveFromCustomerView.description: Indicates if the payment account can be removed from the customer view.

Bin.description: Bank Identification Number (BIN) of the payment method.

IsDefaultPaymentMethod.description: Indicates if this is the default payment method.

IsVisibleToCustomer.description: Indicates if the payment account is visible to the customer.

PaymentAccountType.description: The type of payment account (e.g., card, PayPal).

CustomerId.description: The customer ID associated with the payment account.

PendingInvitation.description: An invitation to join a team at Flipdish.

AppName.description: The name of the brand that you have been invited to join.

Email.description: The email address that the invitation was sent to.

Otc.description: The one-time code that can be used to accept the invitation.

CreatedAt.description: The time that the invitation was created.

AppId.description: Access level is for this App

LoginPinSentViaEmail.description: Login PIN sent via email to user

ForceOktaLogin.description: All flipdishers must login via Okta

PasswordResetPinSentViaEmail.description: Password Reset PIN sent via email to user

SendUserPushNotificationRequest.description: Send a push notification to a user.

SendUserSmsRequest.description: Send an SMS to a user from admin.

SetUserDeliveryLocationFieldRequest.description: Update a single delivery location field (matches legacy SetDeliveryLocationInfo names).

Field.description: Which field to update. Omit or set to null for a validation error.

PredefinedAnswers.description: Predefined answer in case Action == Question

Currency.description: Currency which used by the Store

TaxId.description: VAT number or generic Tax ID of the store

CountryCode.description: Country code of the store address (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)

TaxItem.description: A collection of tax items on the order.

Name.description: The name of the tax item.

Rate.description: The tax rate applied to the item.

Amount.description: The amount of tax applied to the item.

AppId.description: Access level is for this App

HasAccessToAllStores.description: The user has access to all stores for the app (including new stores that added later)

StoreIds.description: Store IDs the user has access to (if HasAccessToAllStores is false)

PropertyIds.description: Property Ids the user has access to (if HasAccessToAllStores is false)

HasAccessToAllStores.description: The user has access to all stores for the app (including new stores that added later)

StoreIds.description: Store IDs the user has access to (if HasAccessToAllStores is false)

PropertyIds.description: Property Ids the user has access to (if HasAccessToAllStores is false)

Name.description: The new name of the Driver.

UserDeliveryLocationAdmin.description: Delivery location with identifiers for admin user management.

UserFlipdishAccount.description: Flipdish account information associated with a user

EmailConfirmed.description: Indicates if the user's email address has been confirmed.

PreventFromUsingCards.description: Indicates if the user is prevented from using cards.

IsUserPhoneNumberBlocked.description: Indicates if the user's phone number is blocked.

UserWhiteLabels.description: List of white label information associated with the user.

UserId.description: The unique identifier for the user.

HasLoggedIn.description: Indicates if the user has logged in.

DisableAppRatingControl.description: Indicates if the app rating control is disabled for the user.

GloballyOptedOut.description: Indicates if the user has globally opted out.

CompletedOrderCount.description: The number of completed orders by the user.

CancelledOrderCount.description: The number of cancelled orders by the user.

OrderTotalValue.description: The total value of orders placed by the user.

TsMostRecentOrder.description: The timestamp of the user's most recent order.

TsFirstOrder.description: The timestamp of the user's first order.

IsRestaurantUser.description: Indicates if the user is a restaurant user.

Installs.description: List of app installs associated with the user.

DeliveryLocations.description: List of delivery locations associated with the user.

PaymentAccounts.description: List of payment accounts associated with the user.

LanguageId.description: The language identifier for the user.

CurrentLanguageName.description: Current language name for the user.

Languages.description: Available languages that the user can choose from.

SalesForceContactId.description: The Salesforce contact ID for the user.

StripeCustomerId.description: The Stripe customer ID for the user.

UserId.description: The unique identifier of the user.

MonthStart.description: The start date of the month for which the commission is calculated.

CommissionAmount.description: The total commission amount for the user in the specified month.

Currency.description: The currency in which the commission is paid.

IsoCurrency.description: The ISO currency code for the commission currency.

UserId.description: User identifier associated with the note.

CreatedByUserId.description: Identifier of the user who created the note.

CreatedByUserName.description: Name of the user who created the note.

CreatedByUserEmail.description: Email of the user who created the note.

UserOrderSummary.description: A previous order row for admin user management (structured; no HTML).

RolesUserNotIn.description: Roles the user is not in

UserSmsChatItem.description: An SMS conversation item for admin user chat.

UserStoreInfo.description: Stores that the user is associated with

oauth2.description: OAuth 2.0. Implicit grant for first-party portal apps; client credentials grant for server-to-server App Store apps (exchange Client ID + Secret Key for a bearer access token).
